lang.label: Language
lang.subtitle: UI language (exports unchanged).
range.title: Date range
format.htmlZipTooltip: HTML plus image files, packaged as a .zip.
onboarding.prompt.title: Welcome!
onboarding.prompt.body: Want a quick 30-second tour of what's new?
target.title: Export source
include.title: Include
settings.afterExport.hint: What happens once the file is saved.
settings.avatarMode.hint: How avatar images are packaged in HTML exports.
settings.avatarMode.disabledHint: Enable "Embed avatars" in the main page to choose how they are packaged.
settings.avatarMode.inline: Embed in HTML file (larger single file)
settings.pdf.hint: Layout preferences applied when exporting as PDF.
settings.imageFallback.hint: Try to get images directly when Teams' proxy fails.
settings.imageFallback.tooltip: Sometimes Teams' image proxy fails to load external images (link previews, repo cards, article thumbnails). When enabled, the extension falls back to fetching them directly from the source. Requires permission to access all websites.
settings.imageFallback.permissionDenied: Permission was not granted. The toggle stays off.
status.running: Export running… you can close this popup.
status.empty: No messages found for the selected range.
status.bundleCompleteWithFailures: Bundle export complete: {success} of {total} chats ({failed} failed).
errors.offline: No network. Reconnect and try again.
errors.startAfterEnd: Start date must be before end date.
errors.needsTeams: Open the Teams web app tab first.
errors.alreadyRunning: An export is already running for this tab
errors.contentScript: Could not load extension on this page
errors.noMessages: No messages found for the selected range.
errors.chatNotOpen: Open a chat conversation before exporting.
errors.teamNotOpen: Open a team channel before exporting.
history.title: Export history
history.empty.title: No exports yet
history.empty.msg: Run your first export and it'll appear here.
settings.title: Settings
settings.about.author: Author
settings.diagnostics.hint: A redacted snapshot of state to include with bug reports.
diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: A snapshot to attach to bug reports. Real IDs are replaced with placeholders. Nothing leaves your computer unless you copy or save it.
diagnostics.includeRawIds.tooltip: Off: IDs become random placeholders. On: real IDs are visible. Do not share publicly with this on.
diagnostics.footer: Placeholders are random and cannot be turned back into the real IDs. Each report uses a fresh set.
diagnostics.probesEmpty: Not run yet. Run probes to check the extension can talk to Teams.
diagnostics.persistence.title: Saved logs
diagnostics.persistence.off: Off: logs stay in memory and are lost when the browser stops the extension.
diagnostics.persistence.on: On: logs are saved to your computer until you clear them.
diagnostics.persistence.size: Saved logs: {bytes}. Cap: 8 MB. Oldest are dropped when full.
diagnostics.persistence.writeFailed: Last save failed: {reason}. Toggle off and on, or click Clear logs.
picker.title: Conversations
picker.stillLoading: Teams is still loading your chats — try refreshing in a few seconds.
picker.rail.label: Filter by kind and folder
onboarding.format.title: Pick one or more formats
onboarding.format.body: Tap any format card to toggle it. When two or more are selected, the exports are packaged together as a single .zip.
onboarding.picker.title: Need to export multiple chats?
onboarding.picker.body: Click the chevron to expand the conversation picker. Tick as many chats as you want — they'll all come back as one bundled .zip with a folder per chat.
onboarding.folder.title: Filter by folder
onboarding.folder.body: The rail on the left filters by chat type or by your Teams folders. Useful when you have hundreds of chats and only want to bulk-export one team's.
onboarding.range.title: Pick a date range
onboarding.range.body: Quick presets for the last 24 h, 7 d, or 30 d, plus ∞ for no filter (everything). Use the date inputs below the chips for a specific window.
onboarding.history.title: Past exports live here
onboarding.history.body: The clock icon opens your export history — re-open any saved file or jump to its folder. Failed exports get an amber badge.
onboarding.settings.title: Defaults, language, and more
onboarding.settings.body: The gear icon opens settings: change the language (24 supported), pick what happens after an export, tweak defaults.
onboarding.stop.title: Export is reversible
onboarding.stop.body: Click Export to begin. During an export the button turns red — click it again any time to stop. The thin bar at the bottom shows progress.
settings.replayTour.hint: Walk through the introduction tour again.
